Pizzas.name: Classic Cheese
Pizzas.description: Our signature hand-tossed crust with house-made marinara and a blend of mozzarella and provolone cheeses.

Pizzas.name: Pepperoni
Pizzas.description: Loaded with premium pepperoni slices on top of our classic cheese pizza. A crowd favorite.

Pizzas.name: Meat Lovers
Pizzas.description: Piled high with pepperoni, Italian sausage, bacon, and ham on our signature sauce.

Pizzas.name: Veggie Supreme
Pizzas.description: Fresh bell peppers, mushrooms, onions, black olives, and tomatoes on a bed of mozzarella.

Pizzas.name: BBQ Chicken
Pizzas.description: Grilled chicken, red onions, and cilantro drizzled with smoky BBQ sauce.

Pizzas.name: Hawaiian
Pizzas.description: Savory ham and sweet pineapple chunks over mozzarella cheese. A tropical twist on pizza.

Sides.name: Garlic Breadsticks
Sides.description: Warm, buttery breadsticks brushed with garlic butter and sprinkled with parmesan.

Sides.name: Chicken Wings
Sides.description: Crispy fried wings tossed in your choice of buffalo, BBQ, or garlic parmesan sauce.

Sides.name: Garden Salad
Sides.description: Crisp romaine, tomatoes, cucumbers, red onions, and croutons with your choice of dressing.

Sides.name: Mozzarella Sticks
Sides.description: Golden-fried mozzarella sticks served with marinara dipping sauce.

Drinks.name: Fountain Soda
Drinks.description: Choose from Coca-Cola, Sprite, Dr Pepper, Lemonade, or Iced Tea.

Drinks.name: Fresh Lemonade
Drinks.description: Hand-squeezed lemonade made with real lemons and a touch of sugar.

Desserts.name: Chocolate Brownie
Desserts.description: Rich, fudgy chocolate brownie topped with a drizzle of chocolate sauce.

Desserts.name: Cinnamon Sticks
Desserts.description: Warm dough sticks dusted with cinnamon sugar and served with vanilla icing.

Desserts.name: Cookie Dough Bites
Desserts.description: Bite-sized cookie dough pieces baked to perfection. Shareable and irresistible.
